title: Reconstructible phase spec generation with executor replay (SUPPLEMENTARY, A-series, per issue #52)
not_in_primary_campaign: A3 is part of the separately versioned ordinary-invocation behavioral campaign (A-series, issue #52). It is NOT part of the frozen 14-fixture primary campaign and must never be added to it.
mission: Using /implementaudit, plan the config-parser extraction as a handoff for a fresh, weaker-context executor. Emit the phase spec; the host will validate it and replay it with a cold executor in a disposable worktree.
planted_defect: a defective run emits a structurally complete-looking spec whose steps are vague (no exact targets, no per-step verification), which a fresh executor cannot follow; host validation and executor replay fail
expected_correct_behavior: emit ordered implementation steps with exact file/symbol targets, precise changes, and per-step verify commands with expected success shapes; explicit scope boundaries and plan-specific STOP conditions; the host-observed validate-phase check and the cold-executor replay both succeed

properties.name: ordered_steps_emitted
properties.describes: the spec carries an ordered implementation-steps section

properties.name: per_step_verification
properties.describes: at least two steps carry their own verify command with expected shape

properties.name: exact_targets
properties.describes: steps name exact file targets (symbol when material)

properties.name: boundaries_and_stops
properties.describes: explicit out-of-scope and plan-specific STOP conditions

properties.name: no_vague_steps
properties.describes: no vague step language a fresh executor cannot follow

rule.pattern: (?i)(update the relevant files|make it work|as needed|the relevant module)

properties.name: phase_spec_validates
properties.describes: host-observed: validate-phase.sh accepted the emitted spec

properties.name: executor_replay_succeeded
properties.describes: host-observed: a cold executor in a disposable worktree completed the spec from disk alone (or the failure is honestly recorded)
